rationale: The citing article is an editor-period historical retrospective (“The Bass Years”) and explicitly says it extends prior JMR histories, while the cited article is a closely parallel historical account of the immediately earlier editor period (“the Bob Ferber Years”) with overlapping constructs like editorial composition and practitioner involvement. Given this thematic and structural overlap, the citation is plausibly foundational/comparative rather than a purely incidental mention. The pair is confirmed by a direct DOI match (10.1509/jmr.51.1.3).
